description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 22 hrs 15 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 4 hrs 14 mins. His work was spread across 3 projects, and his activity was mainly in Python, TypeScript, and Markdown, with some SQL. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new public repositories were recorded.
